name: Jelly
description: Glossy candy blobs squashing and stretching like jelly, each with a sliding highlight — every redraw gives the tray a wobble.

code.style: --goo: @p(var(--color1), var(--color2), var(--color3), var(--color4)); --rule: ( /* the highlight derives from the same emitted geometry as its blob, so it stays glued on */ --jx: @r(5, 28); --jy: @r(5, 28); --jw: @r(42, 66); --jh: @r(42, 66); @random(${shapeFrequency}) { :before { content: ''; position: absolute; left: calc(@var(--jx) * 1%); top: calc(@var(--jy) * 1%); width: calc(@var(--jw) * 1%); height: calc(@var(--jh) * 1%); background: var(--goo); border-radius: 50%; transition: ease 700ms; } :after { content: ''; position: absolute; left: calc((@var(--jx) + @var(--jw) * 0.18) * 1%); top: calc((@var(--jy) + @var(--jh) * 0.13) * 1%); width: calc(@var(--jw) * 0.24%); height: calc(@var(--jh) * 0.18%); background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.85); border-radius: 50%; transition: ease 700ms; } } );
code.doodle: :doodle { @grid: ${grid}; @size: ${width} ${height}; overflow:hidden; text-align:center; box-sizing:border-box } :container { background: var(--color0); overflow:hidden; }
